proposition: The mirrored February 2024 exits — Schlesinger taking 100 % of Blackfish while Oslzla took 100 % of Artstay/Lovs — are consistent with a negotiated separation dividing the two ventures between the two men. No public source states the reason for the split.
shortTitle: The mirrored February 2024 exits — Schlesinger taking 100 % of…
statusExplanation: Analytické čtení citované evidence, nikoli přímo doložený fakt.
